Hard constraints (must): Weight must not exceed 120 gsm (lightweight requirement); Water repellency must be at least 3/5.
Soft preferences (prefer, weighted): Stronger water repellency; Lower weight (lower gsm is better).
Choose the best option among the four candidates (A/B/C/D).

must_sample: Weight must not exceed 120 gsm (lightweight requirement)
Water repellency must be at least 3/5
